summary: [UI] Cluster pool - cluster claim button not re-positioned properly when zooming in/out on the cluster pool page
description:
h4. Description of problem:

[UI] Cluster pool - cluster claim button not re-positioned properly when zooming in/out on the cluster pool page

h4. Version-Release number of selected component (if applicable):

OCP 4.20.14

MCE 2.17.0-DOWNSTREAM-2026-03-19-11-29-29

h4. How reproducible:

h4. Steps to Reproduce:

# Zoom in on the cluster pool page >> cluster claim button not re-positioned properly

h4. Actual results:

h4. Expected results:

h4. Additional info:

steps_to_reproduce.action: navigate to Cluster pools tab under Infrastructure or Clusters
steps_to_reproduce.note: Must navigate to cluster pools page

steps_to_reproduce.action: click on any cluster pool name to open the cluster pool details page
steps_to_reproduce.note: This should navigate to a specific pool's detail page where the Claim cluster button exists

validation_instructions.navigation: After completing reproduction steps, you should be on the correct page to test the UI element.
